mapper.insert: insert into user values ( default, #{uid}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{profileImage}, #{createdAt}, default )
mapper.select: select id, uid, email, provider, provider_id, created_at from provider_user where provider_id = #{provider_id}
select id, nickname, uid, email, profile_image, created_at, days_connected from user where uid = #{uid}
select id, nickname, uid, email, profile_image, created_at, days_connected from user where id = #{id}
select id, uid, email, provider, provider_id, created_at from provider_user where uid = #{uid}
select id, uid, email, provider, provider_id, created_at from provider_user where provider = #{provider} and uid = #{uid}
